bsky.name: Mayor Zohran Kwame Mamdani
bsky.text: This summer, we kept the lights on all night, every night, at five soccer fields across New York City.  This was the scene at Calvert Vaux Park in Gravesend, Brooklyn Tuesday night.
bsky.ko: 올여름 우리는 **뉴욕시** 다섯 곳의 축구장에 매일 밤새도록 불을 밝혀 두었습니다. 화요일 밤 **브루클린 그레이브젠드의 캘버트 복스 공원(Calvert Vaux Park)** 풍경입니다.

bsky.name: Juniper Bear and the Couch Potatoes
bsky.text: Today it has been three months since we adopted Poppy and she is STILL PERFECT!
bsky.ko: 오늘로 **Poppy**를 입양한 지 딱 세 달째인데, 여전히 완벽 그 자체예요!

bsky.name: Ned Hartley
bsky.text: If you do go and see the Odyssey please no spoilers. Some of us haven’t had time to read the book in the last 3000 years.
bsky.ko: 혹시 **오디세이(Odyssey)** 보러 가더라도 제발 스포일러는 금지! 우리 중 몇몇은 지난 3천 년 동안 책 읽을 시간이 없었거든요.

bsky.name: Digital Brain
bsky.text: Alpine ibex leaps sheer cliff face like it is flat ground - these mountain animals can jump 1.8m vertically
bsky.ko: **알프스 아이벡스**가 깎아지른 절벽을 평지처럼 뛰어오른다 — 이 산악 동물은 수직으로 **1.8m**나 점프할 수 있다.

bsky.name: Brent O’Saur
bsky.text: CDs don’t make you listen to 10 minutes of gambling ads before playing 3 songs.

bsky.name: Lucy Betteridge-Dyson
bsky.text: Something special about reading the very book my Mum read to me in 1989 to my little boy who will be 1 next month.
bsky.ko: **1989년** 엄마가 내게 읽어 주셨던 바로 그 책을, 다음 달이면 한 살이 되는 내 아들에게 읽어 준다는 건 뭔가 특별한 일이다.

bsky.name: Marisa Kabas
bsky.text: i wish for everyone a mayor who truly loves their city

bsky.name: Petra Michaela
bsky.text: Bees are disappearing, and our food supply is beginning to collapse. Plants and animals are vanishing, and life is becoming a desert plain. But if humans were to disappear, nature would slowly heal. Rivers would flow more cleanly, forests would grow again, and wildlife would recl
bsky.ko: **벌들이 사라지고**, 우리의 식량 공급이 무너지기 시작하고 있다. 식물과 동물이 자취를 감추고, 생명은 메마른 평원으로 변해 간다. 하지만 만약 **인간이 사라진다면**, 자연은 서서히 치유될 것이다. 강은 더 맑게 흐르고, 숲은 다시 자라나며, 야생은 제자리를 되찾

bsky.name: Digital Brain
bsky.text: A deaf man's cat figured out that meowing was pointless, so he taught himself sign language to communicate with his owner. No training. Just observation.
